column1: # RangeConverter 8-max MTT 100bb 1bb ante — SB RFI (unopened from SB)
# Note: SB unopened is a 3-action chart (fold/limp/raise) — fundamentally
# different from the 2-action EP/MP/CO/BTN charts. "Limp" = complete the
# small blind by adding 0.5bb to call the BB. Mixed cells are 50/50 per
# pure limp — the bulk of the range
